title: Diversion risk: RPi 4B confirmed in Geran-2 (Shahed-136) 'Borscht' tracker
detail: GUR teardown confirmed RPi 4B used as 'Borscht Tracker V3' in Geran-2 drone. 40,000+ units reportedly procured and routed into Russian drone production. Cross-reference with Forge BOM: RPi CM4 used by Freefly Astro (Blue UAS) and Inspired Flight IF1200A (Blue UAS). Same supply chain, competing demand.
prediction: RPi gray market premium in China will remain elevated. Monitor Taobao/AliExpress pricing for CM4 divergence above 30% MSRP as leading indicator of active diversion pipeline.

title: STM32H7 orders 3.2x baseline for Neros Archer production ramp
detail: Drone Dominance FPV program scaling. Neros monthly production jumped from 800 to 2,200 units. STM32H743 orders from authorized distributors spiked correspondingly. Component cross-referenced against Forge BOM — confirmed sole FC MCU for Archer platform.
prediction: STM32H7 lead times likely to extend to 10+ weeks by Q3 2026 if FPV scaling continues at current rate. Alternative: STM32H750 (pin-compatible, lower flash).

title: NVIDIA Jetson Orin NX lead time extended: 12 → 16 weeks
detail: Distributor API data (Arrow, Mouser) shows Jetson Orin NX 16GB lead time increase. Correlated with three Blue UAS platforms scaling simultaneously: Skydio X10D, Shield AI V-BAT, Anduril Ghost-X. DRAM pricing pressure compounds constraint.
prediction: Blue UAS programs collectively consuming ~2,400 Orin NX/month. At current trajectory, allocation-only by Q4 2026.

title: USMC FPV Program contract award: $47M to Red Cat / Teal
detail: Forge Industry Intel picked up USMC contract for Teal 2 at scale. Implies 4,000+ unit delivery over 18 months. QRB5165 (VOXL 2) is sole companion compute — Qualcomm allocation likely secured. Cross-reference: ModalAI Seeker uses same SoM.
prediction: QRB5165 allocation shift toward defense. Commercial ModalAI customers may face longer lead times Q3-Q4 2026.

title: FLIR Boson 640 demand correlated with Ukraine USAI packages (r=0.87, 6wk lag)
detail: Pattern engine detected: Boson 640 lead time extensions correlate with announced Ukraine Security Assistance packages containing Switchblade 600. AeroVironment production ramp is the causal link. Granger test: p=0.003 at 6-week lag.
prediction: Next USAI package announcement likely triggers further Boson 640 allocation tightening within 4-6 weeks.

title: Mesh radio supply bottleneck predicted: Q3 2026
detail: Granger causality model: Defense MANET procurement (Anduril Ghost-X, L3Harris integration) is leading Doodle Labs backlog by ~8 weeks. Current backlog growth rate + Lattice Mesh program = demand exceeds capacity by Q3.
prediction: Mesh radio becomes next supply bottleneck for multi-vehicle Blue UAS. Alternative: Rajant Kinetic Mesh (longer lead but more capacity). Handbook reference: Ch.14 Mesh Radios.

title: RPi 5 confirmed in Russian Molniya-2R reconnaissance drone
detail: GUR War & Sanctions portal documented RPi 5 integrated alongside Chinese Mini PC F8 (rebranded as 'Raskat') running Windows 11. Molniya-2R is the recon variant of the FPV kamikaze drone. RPi 5 8GB retail: $80 MSRP, China gray market: ¥780+ (~$108, +35% premium).
prediction: RPi Foundation tightened end-use requirements for China sales, but gray market circumvention continues. DRAM-driven price hikes may paradoxically slow diversion as cost-benefit ratio shifts for Russian procurement.

title: ELRS 900MHz module pricing up 14% across all distributors
detail: GetFPV, RaceDayQuads, Pyrodrone all raised ELRS 900MHz TX/RX pricing. Price tracker flagged 2.1σ anomaly vs 90-day moving average. Correlates with ESP32/SX1276 chip cost increase and surge in tactical FPV builds for Drone Dominance program. Handbook reference: Ch.1 Link Types, Ch.2 Frequency Bands.
prediction: FPV component inflation driven by dual commercial + defense demand. ELRS ecosystem may face further 8-12% pressure as Drone Dominance scales through H2 2026.
